description: Append one JSON object per durable source read. Suggested keys: date, title, source_type, url, tb_domain, population, design, attachment_names, decision_relevance, note_path.

title: WHO recommends new diagnostic tools to help end TB
decision_relevance: Signals active WHO movement in TB diagnostics and supports prioritizing policy-aligned diagnostic study design.

title: Public call for data to inform WHO policy updates on tools for screening for TB disease
population: people considered for TB disease screening
